title: smilax campestris var. rubiginosa
intro: Smilax campestris var. rubiginosa, also known as the red-tinged or red-stemmed smilax, is a variety of the Smilax campestris plant, a type of flowering vine native to Asia and Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Smilax campestris var. rubiginosa include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and reduce blood pressure. Smilax campestris var. rubiginosa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to support overall health and well-being.
